arts.ttl: Chelsea suffer fresh blow in Liverpool title race as Enzo Maresca option emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Astana on Thursday night in the Conference League but Neto will not serve his suspension in that game. Click this link to follow the football.london Chelsea WhatsApp channel, where you'll be kept up to date on the latest Blues news wherever you are.

arts.ttl: What Chelsea star Jadon Sancho did to Tottenham corner flag as Arsenal theory emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Jadon Sancho was spotted removing a corner flag at Tottenham, which some fans believe could be a dig at Arsenal's set-piece prowess. Some supporters have criticised Arsenal for their reliance on set-piece goals, comparing Arteta's side to Stoke City.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher calls on Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy to be REPLACED - and insists 'someone else needs to be in charge of this football club' as pressure mounts on Ange Postecoglou after Spurs' 4-3 defeat by Chelsea
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has called on Tottenham to make a change in the club's hierarchy by replacing chairman Daniel Levy (left) after Sunday's 4-2 humbling against rivals Chelsea.

arts.ttl: How Spurs' mistakes cost them the Chelsea match
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundits Ashley Williams and Troy Deeney discuss the individual Tottenham Hotspur mistakes that resulted in Chelsea coming from two goals down to win 4-3.

arts.ttl: FA investigating after objects thrown at Chelsea star Cole Palmer during Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Tottenham supporters threw paper at Chelsea players, including Cole Palmer, during the first half of their 4-3 defeat on Sunday - and the FA are now investigating the incidents

arts.ttl: Romeo Lavia injury update: Enzo Maresca on Chelsea midfielder's substitution against Tottenham Hotspur in Premier League win
arts.sum: Romeo Lavia's withdrawal against Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday afternoon was precautionary, with Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca describing his injury as minor.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca says Chelsea 'fans can dream' after the Blues charge into the title race following derby win over Tottenham
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT THE TOTTENHAM HOTSPUR STADIUM: Chelsea closed the gap to Premier League leaders Liverpool while pulling further away from Arsenal and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: ‘We are not ready’: Enzo Maresca plays down title talk after fightback at Spurs
arts.athr: Jacob Steinberg at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach hails ‘perfect’ 4-3 away victory ‘The fans can dream … the important thing is we improve’ Enzo Maresca continued to play down Chelsea’s title chances after they heightened the pressure on Ange Postecoglou by fighting back from 2-0 down to beat Tottenham 4-3 on Sunday. Maresca’s improving young team were left with a mountain to climb after making a dreadful start at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, with Spurs dreaming of a famous victory after punishing two slips from Marc Cucurella during the first 11 minutes. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea join Real Madrid in hunt for Brazilian prodigy
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have been joined in the hunt for one of Brazilian football’s standout talents by a pair of leading Premier League clubs. That’s according to Diario…

arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella throws boots in the bin after first-half nightmare at Tottenham
arts.sum: The Chelsea defender had a terrible first half but made amends after changing his footwear
